description: Legal testimony (marriage permit). Location: Fustat. Dated: Adar 1485 Seleucid, which is 1174 CE. Natan b. Yaḥyā and Shelomo b. Yefet testify that there is no impediment, whether sulṭānī or sharʿī, to the marriage of Dalāl bt. Abū l-Ḥasan. The members of the court sign the qiyyum, although only 2 of the 3 names are preserved: Shemuel ha-Levi b. Seʿadya and Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen b. Yosef. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
